summary: End-to-end testing of new admin panel (auth + gallery + testimonials + bookings) plus regression check on public Home. Backend: 25/25 pytest cases pass against external REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL — login (valid/invalid), /auth/me (with/without token), gallery upload (success, non-image 400, oversized 413, invalid year 400, auth-required 401), gallery delete (success + auth-required), testimonials CRUD (auth on all writes), demo-bookings (public POST, auth-required GET, valid+invalid status updates). Frontend: 17 flow steps pass — /admin without token redirects to /admin/login, login with provided credentials lands on /admin, all 3 tabs visible/switchable, real PNG upload appears in 2026 section and is deletable, testimonial create→edit→delete works, booking status pill click flips to 'contacted' and persists across refresh, sign-out clears session (subsequent /admin redirects to /admin/login), public home (/) still renders with GURUKUL hero. No critical or minor issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') is deprecated in FastAPI; consider migrating to lifespan handler — non-blocking.

Gallery.jsx groups dynamic items into an object keyed with numeric literals {2024:[],2025:[],2026:[]} but compares against backend string year 'it.year' — works in JS due to property-key coercion but is fragile; prefer string keys explicitly.
BookingsList updateStatus passes status as a query param (PUT /demo-bookings/{id}/status?status=...) which works but is non-idiomatic; consider a JSON body for clarity.
GalleryItem accepts year only in {2024,2025,2026}; if the school adds a new year next academic season the API will reject — make this list configurable via env or DB.
test_credentials: Admin: gurukulschoolofmusicblr@gmail.com / Guru@123 (verified working). bcrypt $2b$ hash format used; seed_admin updates existing admin password if changed (server.py startup).
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up multiple TEST_-prefixed gallery items, testimonials, and demo bookings during the run (most are removed by the tests themselves; a few TEST_ prefixed bookings remain by design from previous iteration).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin tests at /app/backend/tests/test_admin_api.py (25 tests, all green). Original public-site regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_gurukul_api.py. Run together: `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v`. Frontend testid contract: admin-login-{email,password,submit}, admin-tab-{gallery,testimonials,bookings}, admin-logout, gallery-{upload-form,file-input,upload-btn,item-{id},delete-{id}}, testimonial-{form,submit-btn,quote-input,author-input,edit-{id},delete-{id}}, booking-{id}, booking-{id}-status-{new|contacted|scheduled|closed}. Auth uses Bearer token in localStorage key 'gurukul_token'; 401 interceptor in /app/frontend/src/lib/api.js redirects to /admin/login.
rca of the issue: N/A — no defects found in this iteration.
